title: An Introduction to Manifolds
backmatter: brief introduction 1-2; appendices A-E 317-359; selected solutions 361-385; list of notations 387-393; references 395-396; index 397-430. Canonical notebooks cover the seven main chapters.

units.title: Euclidean Spaces
units.focus: Smooth functions, derivations, tangent vectors, exterior algebra, and differential forms on Euclidean space.
units.label: Chapter 1

units.title: Manifolds
units.focus: Topological and smooth manifolds, atlases, smooth maps, quotients, and projective examples.
units.label: Chapter 2

units.title: The Tangent Space
units.focus: Tangent spaces, differentials, submanifolds, rank theorems, tangent bundles, partitions of unity, vector fields, flows, Lie brackets, and pushforwards.
units.label: Chapter 3

units.title: Lie Groups and Lie Algebras
units.focus: Matrix Lie groups, Lie subgroups, matrix exponential, determinant differential, left-invariant vector fields, Lie algebras, brackets, and Lie algebra homomorphisms.
units.label: Chapter 4

units.title: Differential Forms
units.focus: Forms on manifolds, cotangent bundle, pullbacks, wedge products, invariant forms, exterior derivative, restriction, Lie derivative, and interior multiplication.
units.label: Chapter 5

units.title: Integration
units.focus: Orientations, manifolds with boundary, boundary orientation, integration of forms, Stokes theorem, line integrals, and Green's theorem.
units.label: Chapter 6

units.title: De Rham Theory
units.focus: De Rham cohomology, exact and Mayer-Vietoris sequences, homotopy invariance, cohomology computations, degree-style invariants, and cochain homotopies.
units.label: Chapter 7
